findings.description: Scrambled reading order at the beginning of the document with duplicated text and misplaced footer elements.
findings.evidence: In the HTML rendering, the right-aligned header text ('PAT McCRORY...') appears duplicated. Additionally, the page footer text ('State of North Carolina...') and a decorative colored bar are incorrectly placed above the main 'MEMORANDUM' title, completely disrupting the logical reading flow of the header section.

findings.description: Page footer breaks the semantic continuity of a bulleted list.
findings.evidence: In the HTML rendering, the page footer text ('State of North Carolina...') and a colored decorative bar from the bottom of the previous page are injected directly into the middle of a bulleted list, appearing between the 'Environmental' and 'Health Issues' bullet points.

findings.description: Page footer breaks the semantic continuity of a bulleted list.
findings.evidence: In the HTML rendering, the page footer text ('State of North Carolina...') and a colored decorative bar from the bottom of the previous page are injected inline into a bulleted list, appearing between the 'Criticism' and 'Dam Safety' bullet points.
